title: NASA's Nuclear Mars Mission: SR-1 Freedom and the Skyfall Helicopters
author: Howard
excerpt: NASA unveils ambitious plans for SR-1 Freedom, the first nuclear-powered interplanetary spacecraft, launching to Mars in December 2028 with Ingenuity-class helicopters.

image_prompts.hero: Nuclear-powered spacecraft SR-1 Freedom approaching Mars, red planet in background, futuristic spacecraft design with glowing nuclear propulsion, cinematic space scene
image_prompts.inline: Fleet of autonomous helicopters exploring Mars surface, red rocky terrain, ground-penetrating radar visualization, scientific exploration concept
